revision.comment: create data page to be loaded from [[Module:Category handler]] with mw.loadData
revision.text:
-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local matchesBlacklist = require('Module:Category handler/shared').matchesBlacklist
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = matchesBlacklist( mw.title.getCurrentTitle().prefixedText, require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') ) or false
return data

-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local matchesBlacklist = require('Module:Category handler/shared').matchesBlacklist
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = matchesBlacklist( mw.title.getCurrentTitle().prefixedText, require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') )
return data

-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local mNamespaceDetect = require('Module:Namespace detect') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mNamespaceDetect.getParamMappings() )
return data

revision.comment: use the new shared function for getting parameter mappings
revision.text:
-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

revision.comment: Protected Module:Category handler/data: [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
revision.text:
-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

revision.comment: Protected "[[Module:Category handler/data]]": High-risk Lua module ([Edit=Allow only autoconfirmed users] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only autoconfirmed users] (indefinite))
revision.text:
-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Module:Category handler/data]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Category_handler/data]]: importing for the list. This is a canonical list of Shrines to work with
revision.text:
-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.

data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working
revision.text:
-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
revision.text:
-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )

local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
revision.text:
-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data

-- This module assembles data to be passed to [[Module:Category handler]] using -- mw.loadData. This includes the configuration data and whether the current -- page matches the title blacklist.
local data = require('Module:Category handler/config') local mShared = require('Module:Category handler/shared') local blacklist = require('Module:Category handler/blacklist') local title = mw.title.getCurrentTitle()
data.currentTitleMatchesBlacklist = mShared.matchesBlacklist( title.prefixedText, blacklist )
data.currentTitleNamespaceParameters = mShared.getNamespaceParameters( title, mShared.getParamMappings() )
return data
